sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the current state from my last analysis:
- White diamond (W, 12px) is now at center (47,17) - moved to where the purple square was
- There's a new purple square (p, 20px) at center (53,22) with a magenta pixel (M) inside at [53,22]
- The dark gray diamond (G, 12px) is at center (59,27) - this seems to be the goal
- The purple ring at top-right is still there unchanged
So the pattern is:
1. Click on a purple square → white diamond moves there, magenta pixel moves along the path, a new purple square appears further along the path
2. The goal seems to be to get the magenta pixel to the dark gray diamond
The new purple square is at (53,22) and the goal (dark gray diamond) is at (59,27). I should click on the new purple square to advance the magenta pixel toward the goal.
